personal.name: Fredrik Andersson
personal.title: Fullstack Developer
personal.tagline: Crafting elegant digital experiences with modern web technologies. Passionate about clean code, innovative solutions, and continuous learning.
personal.bio: Hi! I'm Fredrik, a fullstack developer based in Stockholm, Sweden. I specialize in creating elegant, performant web applications that solve real-world problems. My journey in software development started with a fascination for how things work under the hood. Today, I combine that curiosity with practical experience in modern web technologies to build solutions that users love.

experience.title: Fullstack Developer
experience.description: Building a comprehensive CRM and project management platform using React, Rust, and PostgreSQL. Leading frontend development and contributing to backend architecture.
responsibilities: Led frontend development using React and TypeScript
Contributed to backend architecture with Rust
Implemented real-time features and data synchronization

education.degree: Vocational Degree in Fullstack Development C# .NET
education.description: Comprehensive vocational program focused on fullstack development using C# .NET, covering frontend and backend technologies, database management, and software engineering principles.

education.degree: Technical Preparatory Year in Information & Media Technology
education.description: Preparatory year focusing on information technology and media, providing the foundation for advanced studies in software development and IT systems.

education.description: High school program specializing in information technology, covering programming, networking, web development, and IT project management. But also general subjects such as mathematics, physics, and english.

projects.title: 'Aveno' a CRM and project management platform
projects.shortDescription: A comprehensive CRM and project management solution designed to streamline business operations, enhance customer relationships, and improve team collaboration.
projects.description: A comprehensive CRM and project management solution designed to streamline business operations, enhance customer relationships, and improve team collaboration. Features include project tracking, customer management, team collaboration tools, and detailed analytics.
projects.longDescription: Aveno is a full-featured CRM system built with modern technologies. It provides businesses with tools to manage customer relationships, track projects, collaborate with teams, and analyze business metrics. The platform features a responsive design, real-time updates, and integrations with popular business tools.

projects.title: 'BAMF' an E-Commerce Platform
projects.shortDescription: A modern e-commerce platform with easy inventory management, intuitive interface, modern design, and seamless user experience.
projects.description: A modern e-commerce platform with easy inventory management, intuitive interface, modern design, and seamless user experience. Built with a focus on performance and scalability.
projects.longDescription: BAMF is a cutting-edge e-commerce solution that combines elegant design with powerful functionality. The platform supports product management, order processing, payment integration, and customer analytics, all wrapped in a user-friendly interface.
